name: obsidian-vault-assistant
description: Codex plugin for Obsidian vaults: search context, enrich notes, improve structure, and audit stale content.

interface.shortDescription: Enrich vault knowledge and maintain structure
interface.longDescription: A modular Codex plugin for Obsidian vault work: search context, enrich evergreen notes, create templates, repair structure, and audit stale or inconsistent markdown.
defaultPrompt: Search the vault for relevant context and summarize it.
Find stale notes, broken links, and structural drift.
Create or improve templates for recurring note types.
